task: Adversarial verification of the settlement-boundary-timing CLAIM (+ independent divergence re-derivation)
claim: Settlement boundary is exactly t0 -> t0+300 with no delay/rounding; umaEndDate is a post-window UMA posting buffer; startDate is the trading-listing time, not the price-window start.
method: Recomputed all boundary offsets from RAW gamma ISO strings in meta_rows.json (ignored precomputed *_minus_t0 fields), added cross-checks, and did a fresh live gamma-api refetch of 3 markets.

umaEndDate_minus_t0.note: 16..85s AFTER endDate(=t0+300); post-window UMA resolve buffer, not a price-observation shift

startDate_minus_t0.note: ~22.9..23.9h BEFORE t0; market listing/trading-open time, NOT the price-window start

extra_cross_checks_i_added.t0_on_5min_utc_boundary: 67/67 have second==0 and minute%5==0, matching the ET window-start in the title (e.g. t0=1783425300 -> 2026-07-07T11:55:00Z == 7:55AM ET)
extra_cross_checks_i_added.live_gamma_refetch_3_markets: end-t0=300 and secondsDelay=None on all 3 fresh pulls; cached meta not stale/buggy
extra_cross_checks_i_added.ground_truth_join_spotcheck: pm_res_3d [t0,up] matches gamma outcomePrices for 6/6 (3 Up=["1","0"], 3 Down=["0","1"]); ground-truth outcome read correctly

minor_nuances_not_affecting_verdict: startDate offset is a distribution 22.9-23.9h (not a hard -24h); 'the listing time' characterization holds
tie convention (>= vs >) is moot for the Coinbase proxy: d>0 and d>=0 give identical agreement because exact float ties do not occur

divergence_independently_reproduced.ground_truth: pm_res_3d oracle (Chainlink >= rule), validated against gamma outcomePrices

M2_alt_mirror_open@t0_vs_close@t0+240.note: near-identical to M1; result robust to settle-side proxy choice

agreement_with_prior_verify_results_json: Matches the existing results.json in this dir (97.80% agree, 19 disagree, max 2.22bps/$14.07, 0 wrong hard-calls, 25/25 ground-truth intervals matched).
conclusion: Every sub-claim of the boundary CLAIM reproduces exactly from raw data and a fresh live pull. CLAIM CONFIRMED.
